# REST API / REST API / API ya REST

## 생성 방법 / How to generate / Jinsi ya kutengeneza
```bash
crownycode gen "CRUD REST API 만들어줘" -t rust -o api.rs
crownycode gen "create a REST API with CRUD" -t python -o api.py
crownycode gen "tengeneza API ya REST na CRUD" -t rust -o api.rs
```

## 실행 / Run / Endesha
```bash
# Python
pip install flask
python3 api.py

# Rust
cargo run
```
